description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single `hygiene` stage and uses the shared `.run` template for all jobs. Add a job for each policy named `add-legal-disclaimer-to-direction-epics`, `add-milestone-to-merged-merge-requests`, `analytics-instrumentation-label`, `ask-severity-for-bug-ux-issues`, `ask-severity-for-customer-bug-issues`, `ask-severity-priority-for-infradev-issues`, `assign-default-workflow-label`, `close-old-issues`, `close-stale-bugs`, `close-stale-unhealthy-test-issues`, `community-ping-incorrect-review-label`, `community:ping-inactive-author`, `community:ping-inactive-reviewers`, `discover`, `git:add-active-issues-to-current-milestone`, `git:bump-planning-issues-to-next-milestone`, `git:ensure-issues-have-milestone`, `git:future-issues-start-in-planning-breakdown`, `gitaly:add-active-issues-to-current-milestone`, `gitaly:bump-planning-issues-to-next-milestone`, `gitaly:ensure-issues-have-milestone`, `gitaly:future-issues-start-in-planning-breakdown`, `gitlab-com-appsec-triage-appsec-pings`, `gitlab-com:untriaged-issues`, `gitlab-org-appsec-triage-appsec-pings`, `gitlab-org:dast:refinement`, `gitlab-org:global-search:add-active-items-to-current-milestone`, `gitlab-org:global-search:code-search-label`, `gitlab-org:global-search:code-search-validation-backlog`, `gitlab-org:global-search:weights`, `gitlab-org:manage-authentication_and_authorization:feature-flag-check`, `gitlab-org:operate:auto-close-old-issues`, `gitlab-org:remote-development:workflow-02`, `gitlab-org:remote-development:workflow-03`, `gitlab-org:remote-development:workflow-04`, `gitlab-org:remote-development:workflow-05`, `gitlab-org:secret-detection:refinement`, `gitlab-org:security-insights:internal-bug-triage`, `gitlab-org:security-insights:refinement`, `gitlab-org:security-insights:remove-assignee`, `gitlab-org:security-insights:tech-stack-label`, `gitlab-org:security-insights:weights`, `gitlab-org:stage-and-group-labels-hygiene`, `gitlab-org:untriaged-issues`, `growth-add-fo-label` (and others omitted for brevity). Each job runs in the `hygiene` stage, has a `rules` clause that triggers only when its specific `$TRIAGE_…` variable is true, and sets a `TRIAGE_POLICY_FILE` variable pointing to the corresponding policy YAML (e.g., `policies/stages/hygiene/add-legal-disclaimer-to-direction-epics.yml`). Jobs that also need a source specify `TRIAGE_SOURCE_PATH` and `TRIAGE_SOURCE_TYPE` variables. All jobs inherit the `.run` template which executes the policy file (e.g., `triage-run $TRIAGE_POLICY_FILE`). No caches, artifacts, Docker images, services, or deployment targets are defined.
